steps.expected: Full benchmark object with id, status, urls, audit_ids, trust_scores, created_at
steps.observed: 200 with all required fields: id (UUID), status='completed', urls=['https://example.com/','https://example.org/'], audit_ids (2 UUIDs), trust_scores map, created_at

steps.action: POST /api/benchmarks with 2 valid URLs, selected_scenarios, selected_personas
steps.expected: 201 with benchmark object: id (UUID), status='queued', urls, audit_ids, created_at
steps.observed: 201 returned with id='e76c0d6e-c347-427d-92d3-a032ba2a843b', status='queued', urls=['https://httpbin.org/','https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/'], audit_ids (2 UUIDs), trust_scores=null, created_at present

steps.expected: Real audit with target_url matching first URL
Real audit with target_url matching second URL

assertions.title: Benchmark API — get and list endpoints

steps.expected: Full benchmark object with trust_scores map

steps.observed: 200 with array of benchmark objects. List returned correctly (contained pre-created benchmark initially; after POST test, newest first).

assertions.title: Benchmark results include per-URL video recordings

steps.observed: 200 with video_urls={} (empty dict). The video_urls field is present but empty because benchmark audits run in mock/live mode against example.com which produces no actual video files. This is expected per test data notes: 'Video URLs on audits: empty dict {} (benchmark audits created in mock mode)'.
200 with video_urls={} (empty dict). Same expected behavior as above.

steps.action: Verify video event phases in audit events
steps.expected: Events with phase='video' present in audit timeline
steps.observed: Both audits have multiple events with phase='video' and messages like 'Recording browser session for cookie_consent/privacy_sensitive'. Video recording infrastructure is active; videos are empty because Nova Act is mocked against example sites.

assertions.issues: video_urls is empty {} for both benchmark audits. This is documented expected behavior for benchmark audits in mock mode against example.com/example.org. The video_urls field exists and the video recording events are emitted, but no actual video files are produced because Nova Act is mocked.

steps.action: Run frontend vitest: npx vitest run
Run TypeScript strict check: npx tsc -b

steps.observed: 0 errors, 12 warnings (all pre-existing complexity/max-lines warnings documented in AGENTS.md)

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed. VAL-BENCH-005: POST /api/benchmarks returns 201 with correct structure, each audit_id maps to retrievable audit. VAL-BENCH-013: GET by ID returns full object with trust_scores, list endpoint works, unknown ID returns 404. VAL-CROSS-003: Benchmark audit responses include video_urls field (empty {} as expected in mock mode) and video phase events. VAL-CROSS-006: All 303 backend tests pass, all 212 frontend tests pass, TypeScript strict check clean, ESLint 0 errors, ruff clean, backend coverage 59.70% >= 50%.
